sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18503" key="a)/frissa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄφρισσα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a plant, <sense id="n18503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀσκληπιάς</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apul.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Herb.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
